offspring.diff: Replaced one-line combat-first prompt with explicit 4-level priority hierarchy (survival > space-denial > combat > food) plus concrete briefing instructions (length delta, enemy region size, flood-fill count) to address weak win-rate vs strong opponents (0.40) caused by self-trapping during aggressive play.

Added trap-avoidance concept: before committing to any aggressive move, verify own flood-fill reachable squares stay above a safe threshold and discard moves that would seal the snake into a pocket, keeping escape routes open while still applying pressure.
Increased refine_rounds from 2 to 3 to give the planner an extra self-correction pass, targeting the weak win-rate vs strong opponents (0.30).
Added 'combat' specialist to address low win-rates vs moderate (43%) and strong (39%) rungs where head-to-head collision avoidance/targeting was missing.
